cmssw-tool-conf: Added back celeritas for G4 branch
Geant4: cleanup unused variables and use GEANT4_USE_USOLIDS="all"

[GCC11] Update geant4 to 11.0.7 and dd4hep to 01.22
[vecgeom][gcc11] drop CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE to let veccgeom use its default flags
[llvm] use same host triple as set by gcc
Fix go.spec for  cc8 ppc64le to provide the missing deps
use openssl from system for cc8
[CMSSWDATA] Use Source0 to allow extra possible sources
test April CRAB client in crab-dev
[CC8] Use default zlib for non-x86_64 archs
updated bootstrap driver for cc8 aarch64 and ppc64le
Updates SCRAM to version SCRAMV1 V2_2_9_pre05
